item.title: Immunovant (FcRn Inhibitor)
item.description:
• Summary: Immunovant's FcRn inhibitor, batoclimab, fails in two Phase 3 trials for thyroid eye disease (TED), validating concerns about the drug's efficacy and the company's waning prospects. The setbacks highlight challenges in targeting autoimmune eye conditions with FcRn blockade, impacting Immunovant's clinical pipeline.
  • MoAs: FcRn inhibitor (batoclimab): Blocks neonatal Fc receptor to reduce IgG antibody levels
  • Sources: Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News
